title: TN38 8FB, Southern Water Services Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/KP3630KV/V003
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Southern Water Services Limited   Installation name: Bexhill and Hastings Sludge Treatment Centre   Permit number: EPR/KP3630KV/V003   "
